source_of_truth: Markdown remains the operational source of truth. This spec is a derived machine-checkable policy inventory.

items.name: Parallel Execution Policy Constraints
items.description: Core policy constraints for managed parallel execution groups.
required_checks_before_parallel_executio: QA plan or documented QA decision
forbidden_parallel_execution_conditions: security/auth/privacy-sensitive changes unless explicitly approved and isolated
AI system behavior changes unless handled as controlled evolution with explicit approval
one package output is required input for another package
unresolved questions or blockers that affect package independence
broad package scopes that cannot be reviewed independently
